notes: CPA 350=3.5x emits add_creative (resetsLearning:yes) + pause. learningState=learning -> live path sets learningPhaseActive=true, so the V2 reset-class lockout holds add_creative as an in_learning_phase watch (V1 also holds the pause as the campaign-level backstop). Reduced label: watch.

V2-isolating: CPA 250=2.5x is above the add_creative 2x threshold but below the pause 3x threshold, so the engine emits ONLY a reset-class add_creative (no pause). With learningState=learning the live path derives learningPhaseActive=true and the V2 reset-class lockout converts it to an in_learning_phase watch -> reduced label watch. Were learningPhaseActive false here, add_creative would surface as a recommendation (V1 still holds it under learning, but this fixture's contrast lives in campaign-decision.test.ts).

learning_limited input-dimension coverage (drift guard). deriveLearningPhaseActive treats learning_limited like learning -> learningPhaseActive=true, so the reset-class add_creative (cpa 2.5x, no pause at this level) is held as an in_learning_phase watch -> reduced label watch. NOTE: the spec §11 'learning-limited -> STRUCTURAL remedy' (expand_targeting/consolidate/review_budget) is emitted in the audit-runner AD-SET loop via diagnoseLearningLimited, OUTSIDE decideForCampaign; that is covered by audit-runner tests (see README Coverage & deferrals), not at this seam.
